metadata.description: Agent skills for code cleanup, dead-code audits, necessary-code review, and page-flow simplification

plugins.name: claude-code-cleanup-skills
plugins.description: Collection of code cleanup skills for necessary-code audits, unused-code checks, and page-flow cleanup

plugins.name: necessary-code-audit
plugins.description: Audit used code to decide whether wrappers, compatibility surfaces, stale APIs, defensive branches, defaults, or configs are still necessary

plugins.name: unused-code-audit
plugins.description: Prove whether files, exports, helpers, components, hooks, types, and directories still have live consumers before deletion

plugins.name: page-flow-cleanup-audit
plugins.description: Clean page and feature flows by tracing state sources, queries, mutations, permissions, errors, and duplicated calculations
